self_report.numeric_verdict: At n=1,2,3 the product 1,3,15 lies between ((2n-1)/e)^((2n-1)/2)=0.607,1.159,4.589 and ((2n+1)/e)^((2n+1)/2)=1.159,4.589,27.4 — the asserted direction (with (2n+1) bound on the left) reverses this and fails at every n.
self_report.notes: The asserted claim swaps the two bounds; the standard Putnam 1996 B-2 inequality has (2n-1)/e on the lower side and (2n+1)/e on the upper side.
